item.title: Starting to Blog, Again
item.description: This blog is not the first blog I have started. And this post is not the first blog post I have written. In fact, I have written many posts that never see the light of the day. Some of them are buried somewhere in the note or document applications, and some are hidden in my laptop’s directories as markdown files. If not for the imposter syndrome, fear of being imperfect, and lack of conviction I could have started a blog roughly four years ago and the time thereafter.
